name: Transform Dating App
description:
Welcome to the Transform Dating App, where your soulmate is only a swipe away and fully customizable!

This app will show you dating profiles of various people along with photos of them and a series of stats about them: Age, Race, Height, Body Type, Hobbies, Education, Ideal First Date, Favorite Way to Spend a Weekend, etc…

You can alter any of the stats you would like and watch all the changes that unfold! Additionally, you can add stats of your choosing to a profile to further change a person
creator: Fatguylover
